title: OpenStairs
description: A simple mod that adds slim, attractive variants of stairs for cleaner building. Now for 1.20.1
body:
![banner for mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c023c6197461ae4e617d8f3492856acc7a9f081.png)
**A 1.20.1 mod that adds slim, floating versions of all wood types of stairs.**



Made on the Stonecutter using Logs/Stems, you can find 4 new blocks for each wood
A free standing, floating stair
a version with a post in the middle
and inside and outside corners

One log makes 4 stairs, the corner pieces are a North-West angle. Currently looking into having them be a crafted, single block item but at the moment, they are currently not. 




I have no intention of adding other/stone materials at the time, as this is mostly for making interiors look a bit nicer and realistic without having to take up a lot of space with funky stair designs, so not a lot of fluff. 



**Disclaimer, this was made in MCreator, if you don't like that, that's great, this is still made with MCreator. **
**Requires the latest version of Forge for for the mod version of choice.**
